## Description

<!-- What does this PR change and why? Link issues (e.g. closes #123). -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behavior to change)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Infrastructure / DevOps (Terraform, Kubernetes, CI)
- [ ] Chore (tooling, dependencies, formatting)

## Checklist (tests, docs, breaking changes)

- [ ] **Tests** — pass locally (`npm test`, `jest`, etc.) where applicable
- [ ] **Docs** — updated (README, `docs/`, OpenAPI, ADRs) when behavior or setup changed
- [ ] **Breaking changes** — considered (API, schema, env vars) and documented in the description or changelog
- [ ] I have read **CODEOWNERS** and requested review from the right team(s)
- [ ] My commits are **signed** (`git commit -S` or `commit.gpgsign=true`) and will show as **Verified** on GitHub
- [ ] **No secrets** (keys, tokens, `.env` contents) are committed
